title: Trump's impact on Gen Z's view of the president
shortDescription: When Gen Z first tuned into politics, Trump was running for president. How will his term and transition of power to Biden impact their votes in 2024?

title: Gen Z voters reveal who they plan to support in November
shortDescription: Gen Z voters reveal who they plan to support in November

title: Top House Democrat decries GOP effort to hold AG Garland in contempt
shortDescription: The top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee is chiding Republicans for holding Garland in contempt.

title: 'We will hunt you down,' if Trump wins: Steve Bannon on ex-FBI chiefs
shortDescription: Former Trump advisor Steve Bannon warned the last two ex-FBI directors: 'Get your passport, get the hell out of the country because hey, we're coming'

title: Critical primaries in 4 states Tuesday could loom large for November
shortDescription: In one important contest, S.C. Rep. Nancy Mace's primary could serve as a test of Trump's strength with the GOP base. She's also a VP contender.

title: Follow the money: Who are the top donors to Biden, Trump and RFK?
shortDescription: We are tracking the presidential election fundraising for Joe Biden, Donald Trump and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. The story will be updated as new filings come in.

title: New York voters backed by DNC sue to keep RFK Jr. off ballot
shortDescription: A lawsuit filed by two New York voters argues Robert F. Kennedy Jr. failed to submit enough valid signatures to run for president in New York.

title: Kohl's was never a GOP convention sponsor, didn't pull out | Fact check
shortDescription: The Wisconsin-based retailer was never a sponsor of the convention in Milwaukee in the first place, a company spokesperson said.

title: Controversial Texas immigration law remains on hold | Fact check
shortDescription: The Supreme Court's March 19 opinion said it was not ruling on whether the law was constitutional. The law remains on hold as litigation continues.

title: Here's the lineup for this year's White House Juneteenth concert
shortDescription: The "Godmother of Soul," Patti LaBelle, Gladys Knight, Brittney Spencer and others to perform tonight at the White House.

title: Trump at Vegas rally: 'I don't care about you, I just want your vote'
shortDescription: Donald Trump spoke to a crowd in 104-degree heat in Las Vegas, Nevada Sunday. Six people were hospitalized in heat-related illnesses. See video.

title: Trump goes on tangent about his fear of sharks in Nevada
shortDescription: The GOP frontrunner veered off-script and talked about his well-documented fear of sharks during a rally in Nevada.

title: Donald Trump questioned whether Taylor Swift is 'legitimately liberal' in book
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump questioned whether pop star Taylor Swift was “legitimately liberal,” according to an excerpt from an upcoming book.

title: Hollywood writers, directors are trying to help Joe Biden win over young voters
shortDescription: An assembly of writers, directors and producers aim to engage and turn out young voters on behalf of Biden ahead of a tight contest with Trump.

title: Trump to be interviewed by New York probation Monday: media reports
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump faces a probation interview Monday ahead of his sentencing next month in his hush money criminal case.

title: Election 2024: Why Democrats are keeping a close eye on Nebraska
shortDescription: If Biden loses key battleground states he barely won in 2020, just one electoral point could be the tie breaker.

title: Kamala Harris hits Donald Trump's potential vice presidential picks
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris said in a new interview that former President Donald Trump wants an “enabler” for vice president.

title: Convicted Jan. 6 rioter running for Congress walks out of debate
shortDescription: Convicted Jan. 6 rioter Chuck Hand, a Republican candidate who is running for Georgia’s second congressional district, walked out of a televised debate.

title: Hunter Biden has family support day 1 of trial
shortDescription: Jury selection has begun in the Hunter Biden trial and he is accompanied by his sister, wife and step-mother.

title: August primaries and state legislative races to keep an eye on
shortDescription: Democratic National Party just gave a cash-infusion of $2 million for upcoming down-ballot primaries races that need an extra boost.

title: Donald Trump addresses Christian group that wants all abortion banned
shortDescription: Trump, who has touted his role in overturning Roe, made a virtual appearance for an evangelical, anti-abortion group's event on Monday.

title: Trump supporters suffer from Vegas heat at rally
shortDescription: Donald Trump held a rally in 104-degree weather at a park in Las Vegas. Thousands of supporters showed up but some collapsed from the heat.
